mapper.sql: rv.re_id rr_id, rv.vocational_name, rv.vocational_level, rv.evaluation_time, rv.evaluation_mechanism, rv.vocational_validity, rv.remarks, rv.new_vocational_flag, rv.attribute1, rv.attribute2, rv.attribute3, rv.enabled_flag, rv.id, rv.create_time, rv.create_by, rv.update_time, rv.update_by

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rr_id, ${tAlias}.vocational_name as ${tAlias}_vocational_name, ${tAlias}.vocational_level as ${tAlias}_vocational_level, ${tAlias}.evaluation_time as ${tAlias}_evaluation_time, ${tAlias}.evaluation_mechanism as ${tAlias}_evaluation_mechanism, ${tAlias}.vocational_validity as ${tAlias}_vocational_validity, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.new_vocational_flag as ${tAlias}_new_vocational_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into re_vocational (re_id, vocational_name, vocational_level, evaluation_time, evaluation_mechanism, vocational_validity, remarks, new_vocational_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{vocationalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vocationalLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{evaluationMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vocationalValidity,jdbcType=DATE}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newVocationalFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_vocational set re_id = #{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, vocational_name = #{vocationalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vocational_level = #{vocationalLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluation_time = #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, evaluation_mechanism = #{evaluationMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vocational_validity = #{vocationalValidity,jdbcType=DATE}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, new_vocational_flag = #{newVocationalFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
